title: Pydantic AI v2 — structured multi-agent orchestration
summary: Testing the new agent handoff API against the AgenTrix orchestration pattern. Cleaner than manually wiring FastAPI dependency chains for tool routing.

title: Supabase database branching
summary: Per-PR database branches would eliminate the need for a separate staging project. Waiting for pricing clarity before adopting on the portfolio backend.

title: Gemini 2.0 Flash — low-latency reasoning upgrade
summary: Swapped from Flash 1.5 to 2.0 Flash in AgenTrix for structured extraction tasks. Noticeably faster tool call resolution with comparable accuracy on insurance domain data.

title: Next.js 16 + Turbopack in dev
summary: This portfolio itself runs on Next.js 16 with Turbopack. Sub-500ms HMR makes the dev loop noticeably snappier than webpack mode — no breaking changes migrating from 15.

title: n8n self-hosted — workflow automation for agentic pipelines
summary: Used in AgenTrix to orchestrate document ingestion and notification workflows without writing glue code. Docker-based self-hosting is straightforward with Render.

title: pgvector on Supabase — vector search for RAG
summary: Used cosine similarity search via pgvector in AgenTrix for claim document retrieval. IVFFlat index requires minimum rows before it's useful — flat scan is fine at small scale.

title: Rust — working through ownership model
summary: Reading 'The Rust Book' slowly alongside semester work. Not targeting a project yet — building mental model for when WebAssembly becomes relevant to my stack.

title: Basys 3 + VHDL — FPGA hands-on
summary: Used for the nanoprocessor project. VHDL test bench simulation in ModelSim before flashing to board is the workflow — dramatically reduces board-debug cycles.

title: Tailwind CSS v4 — @theme directive, no config file
summary: This portfolio uses Tailwind v4. The @theme directive replaces tailwind.config.ts and CSS variables are first-class. Migration from v3 took under an hour for a fresh project.

title: Re-reading: Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al.)
summary: Revisiting the transformer paper after working through encoder-decoder patterns in FastAPI. The positional encoding section makes more sense once you've built sequence models.
